notes: A fix-up round. Tapping the screensaver to dismiss it now reliably opens your chosen app (like Home Assistant) no matter how long the frame has been up, and smart-home screen state stays accurate after dismissing. Waking the Portal with a tap during the overnight screen-off window works properly now. The photo frame gains a switch to turn off the bottom gradient for clean edge-to-edge art, Immich sources can play videos, and Immich connection problems are now logged for easier troubleshooting. Timers get a Reset button, folders can be created on the home screen again, and the provisioning kit fixes the Settings app on first-gen devices.
